items.name: SSC – Group B & Group C – 12256 Posts
items.qualification: Any Graduate, Any Bachelors Degree, MBA/PGDM

basic_details.job_title: SSC CGL Recruitment 2026 Notification Out - Apply Online for 12256 Group B & Group C Posts
basic_details.short_information: SSC CGL Recruitment 2026 notification is out to fill 12256 vacancies for Group B & Group C vacancies across India. Candidates can apply online only from 21.05.2026 to 22.06.2026 through SSC website ssc.gov.in.
basic_details.post_name: Various Group B (Gazetted/Non-Gazetted) and Group C posts including Assistant Section Officer, Inspector (IT/CE), Sub Inspector (CBI/NIA), Junior Statistical Officer, Assistant Audit Officer, Tax Assistant, Auditor, Accountant, Postal Assistant, and more
basic_details.application_mode: Online only at https://ssc.gov.in or via mY SSC mobile app

age_limit.age_details: Vocabulary, grammar, synonyms, antonyms, idioms, sentence improvement, comprehension passages (current affairs + editorial based)

qualification.education_qualification: Bachelor's Degree from a recognized University or equivalent for most posts, as on 01-08-2026.

salary_details.pay_scale: Pay Level 4 (Rs. 25,500–81,100) to Pay Level 8 (Rs. 47,600–1,51,100) depending on the post

how_to_apply: Candidates must apply online only at https://ssc.gov.in or through the mY SSC mobile application (available on Google Play Store). No other mode of application is accepted. Candidates who have not generated OTR on the new website must do so first. Once OTR is generated on the new website, it remains valid for all future examinations on that portal.
seo_tags: Staff Selection Commission Group B & Group C Recruitment 2026
SSC Group B & Group C Jobs 2026
SSC Group B & Group C Careers

items.name: BEL – Field Operation Engineer, Project Engineer-I – 56 Posts

basic_details.job_title: BEL Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for 56 Field Operation Engineer, Project Engineer Posts
basic_details.short_information: BEL Recruitment 2026 aims to fill 56 new vacancies for Field Operation Engineer, Project Engineer posts. Eligible candidates with B.E/B.Tech/B.Sc can apply online from 20-05-2026 to 08-06-2026 through the official BEL website, bel-india.in.
basic_details.organization_name: Homeland Security and Smart City Business SBU (HLS&SCB), Bharat Electronics Limited
basic_details.application_mode: Online only (via Microsoft Office Form link / QR code on BEL website)

qualification.education_qualification: ME/M.Tech/BE/B.Tech/B.Sc Engineering (4-year course) or MCA from AICTE/UGC approved college/institute or recognized university. Pass class for all categories including SC/ST/PwBD.

selection_process: Pre-Registered Walk-In Selection: Written Test (85 marks) + Interview (15 marks)
how_to_apply: Candidates shall apply online only through the Microsoft Office Form link / QR code provided on the BEL official website. Registrations received in any other format will not be considered. Candidates must first pay the application fee via SBI Collect, note the reference number, and then complete the online form. Applications that are incomplete, not legible, contain false or suppressed information, or do not meet the eligibility criteria will be summarily rejected.

salary_details.pay_scale: Upto Rs. 1,25,000/- consolidated per month for Technical Manager; Rs. 1,000/- per hour for Faculty.

basic_details.job_title: PSSSB Group C Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for 06 Line Superintendent Posts
basic_details.short_information: The Punjab Subordinate Services Selection Board (PSSSB) Recruitment 2026 for posts of 06 Line Superintendent. Candidates with Diploma Can Apply Online. The online application opens on 15-05-2026, and closes on 05-06-2026. The candidate shall apply online through PSSSB website, sssb.punjab.gov.in.

age_limit.age_details: For Group-C posts: Must secure minimum 50% marks in qualifying Punjabi Language test equivalent to Matriculation standard — as per Punjab Govt. Notification No. GSR72/Const./Art.309/Amd.(22)/2022 dated 28.10.2022

qualification.education_qualification: Three years Diploma in Electrical Engineering from a recognized institution

salary_details.pay_scale: Rs. 35,400/- (Level-6) as per 7th Central Pay Commission Pay Scale + Allowances

selection_process: Written Examination (MCQ) – Part A (Qualifying) + Part B (Merit) → Counselling/Document Verification
how_to_apply: Applications must be submitted online only through the SSSB Punjab portal https://sssb.punjab.gov.in. Applications submitted by any other mode (post, in person, etc.) will not be accepted and will be rejected.
seo_tags: Punjab Subordinate Services Selection Board Line Superintendent Recruitment 2026

basic_details.job_title: PSSSB Veterinary Inspector Recruitment 2026 Notification Out - Apply Online for 150 Posts
basic_details.short_information: PSSSB Recruitment 2026–27: Get latest PSSSB recruitment notification 2026 for 150 Veterinary Inspector vacancies. Apply online from 4th May 2026 to 25th May 2026 through the official PSSSB career portal.
basic_details.organization_name: Directorate, Animal Husbandry Department, Government of Punjab

application_fee.general_fee: Category-wise online application fee as given under the “Fee Details” section of the notification

qualification.education_qualification: As per prescribed educational/technical qualification for Veterinary Inspector (as given in the notification)

salary_details.pay_scale: As per Punjab Government Group-C pay scale for Veterinary Inspector (refer notification)

how_to_apply: The application process for Punjab SSSB Veterinary Inspector Recruitment 2026 is completely online through the official website of SSSB Punjab. Applications submitted through any mode other than the online portal will not be accepted under any circumstances.

items.name: IISER Mohali – Non Teaching – 40 Posts
items.qualification: Any Bachelors Degree, B.Tech/B.E, 10TH, Any Masters Degree, M.Sc, MCA, M.Lib, BS

basic_details.job_title: IISER Mohali Non Faculty Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for 40 Attendant, Junior Engineer and More Posts
basic_details.short_information: IISER Mohali Non Faculty Recruitment 2026 notification is out to fill 40 vacancies across Punjab. Candidates with Any Bachelors Degree, B.Tech/B.E, 10TH, Any Masters Degree, M.Sc, MCA, M.Lib, BS Can Apply Online. The online application opens on 03-05-2026, and closes on 15-06-2026. The candidate shall apply online through IISER Mohali website, iisermohali.ac.in.
basic_details.organization_name: Indian Institute of Science Education and Research, Mohali (Ministry of Education, Govt. of India)

age_limit.age_details: Written Test / Skill Test / Interview - as applicable per post (venue decided by IISER Mohali)

qualification.education_qualification: Bachelor's Degree in Physical Education/Sports Sciences with minimum 55% marks or equivalent grade with 3 years of relevant full-time experience after Bachelor's Degree

salary_details.pay_scale: As per 7th CPC Pay Matrix - Level 1 to Level 13 depending on post

selection_process: Written Test / Skill Test / Interview (as applicable per post)
how_to_apply: Applications must be submitted online only at erp.iisermohali.ac.in. Applications received in hard copy format or any other mode will be summarily rejected. The last date is 15/06/2026 up to 05:00 PM. Candidates are advised to submit well before the closing date to avoid connectivity issues due to heavy load on the website. Once submitted, the application cannot be withdrawn under any circumstances and no editing will be allowed. All correspondence including admit cards will be sent to the registered email ID only - no hard copy letters will be sent.
seo_tags: Indian Institute of Science Education and Research Mohali Non Teaching Recruitment 2026

basic_details.job_title: PAU Research Fellow Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline
basic_details.short_information: Punjab Agricultural University (PAU) Recruitment 2026 for 1 post of Research Fellow. Candidates with B.Sc, M.Sc Can Apply Offline. The last date to apply offline is 25-05-2026. The candidate shall apply offline through PAU official website pau.edu.

qualification.education_qualification: B.Sc. Agri/ B.Sc.Agri.(Hons)/ B.Sc. (Hons)Agri./ B.Sc. Biotech (Hons)/ B.Sc. Hort./ B.Sc. (Hons) Hort/ B.Sc. Forestry/ B.Sc. (Hons) Forestry with minimum OCPA of 6.00/10.00 basis or 60% marks. OR M.Sc. Agronomy/M.Sc. Soil Science/ M.Sc. Agricultural Meteorology with minimum OCPA 6.50/10.00 basis or 65% marks with NET may be recruited as Research Fellow. Ph.D. candidates are exempted from NET.

salary_details.pay_scale: Rs. 37,000/- fixed + 16% HRA p.m. or Rs. 25,000/- + 16% HRA (FIXED) per month

how_to_apply: Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: pau.edu.
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 25-05-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.
seo_tags: Punjab Agricultural University Research Fellow Recruitment 2026

items.name: AIIMS Bathinda – Clinical Psychologist, Special Educator and More Posts – 4 Posts
items.qualification: B.Sc, M.Sc, M.A, B.Ed, M.Phil/Ph.D, 12TH, Diploma

basic_details.job_title: AIIMS Bathinda Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for Clinical Psychologist, Special Educator and More Posts
basic_details.short_information: All India Institute of Medical Sciences, Bathinda (AIIMS Bathinda) has released a recruitment notification for 4 posts including Clinical Psychologist - 1, Junior Audiologist & Speech Therapist - 1, Occupational Therapist - 1 and Special Educator - 1 for candidates with M.A./M.Sc. in Psychology, B.Sc. in Speech and Hearing, Bachelor’s Degree in Occupational Therapy, or B.Ed. in Special Education, and candidates can apply online from 07-05-2026 to 28-05-2026 at www.aiimsbathinda.edu.in.

qualification.education_qualification: M.A./M.Sc. in Psychology + M.Phil. in Clinical Psychology, B.Sc. Degree in Speech and Hearing, 10+2 in Science + Bachelor's Degree in Occupational Therapy, B.Ed. in Special Education or equivalent

how_to_apply: Applications must be submitted online on or before 28-05-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of AIIMS Bathinda to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.
